shots.section: string — section label from beat grid, e.g. 'verse_1'
shots.shot_type: string — from: extreme_wide | wide | medium_wide | medium | medium_close | close_up | extreme_close | insert | overhead | pov
shots.camera_movement: string — from: static | pan_left | pan_right | tilt_up | tilt_down | zoom_in | zoom_out | dolly_in | dolly_out | orbit_left | orbit_right | crane_up | crane_down | handheld | tracking
shots.subject: string — what/who is in frame, referencing continuity package labels, e.g. 'singer_main'
shots.subject_action: string — what the subject does, e.g. 'turns to face camera, singing'
shots.environment: string — referencing continuity package location labels, e.g. 'stage_dark'
shots.lighting: string — referencing continuity package lighting rules, e.g. 'amber_side_key'
active_motifs: string — motif names from motif extraction, e.g. 'empty_chair', 'spotlight'
shots.lip_sync: boolean — whether this shot requires lip-sync generation
shots.lip_sync_text: string | null — the specific lyric being sung in this shot, if lip_sync is true
shots.hero_shot: boolean — whether this is a high-priority shot that gets maximum generation attempts
shots.shot_purpose: string — from: performance | narrative | symbolic | transition | establishing | reaction | filler
shots.assigned_model: string — the video generation model for this shot, e.g. 'kling_3.0', 'runway_gen4_turbo', 'veo_3.1', 'seedance_2.0'
shots.max_single_generation: number — max seconds this model can produce in one pass

transition_in.type: string — from: hard_cut | crossfade | dissolve | match_cut | whip_pan | color_shift | zoom_bridge | morph | fade_from_black | none
transition_in.coordination_notes: string | null — keyframe composition requirements for this transition, e.g. 'must match framing of S014 end frame'

transition_out.type: string — same vocabulary as transition_in type

shots.end_state: string — description of how this clip should end to support the next shot, e.g. 'camera arrives at wide shot, singer center frame, facing away'
shots.notes: string | null — any additional context for prompt translation or generation
